data.title: Update project docs to reflect sprint gap detection and routing
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant docs to reflect the 4 detection checkpoints, CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal, REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats, and non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED behavior.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the detection and routing mechanics.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section, signal format documentation, config key documentation
- OUT: Epic A documentation (separate story 8350-8f20)

## Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents all 4 detection checkpoints, the CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal, REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED formats, and non-interactive handling
  ← Satisfies: all 5 success criteria (documentation layer)

## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
